// Code Generated by Sidekick is for learning and experimentation purposes only.

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Net.Http;
using System.Text;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace EntityAttribute_POC
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Manages the test project scaffold, build, and execution for Phase 2.5.
    /// Uses LLM to generate NUnit tests and Gherkin/SpecFlow integration tests.
    /// </summary>
    public class LLMTestGenerator
    {
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // FIELDS
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private readonly string _llmEndpoint;
        private readonly string _llmDeployment;
        private readonly string _llmApiKey;
        private readonly string _apiVersion;
        private readonly HttpClient _httpClient;

        private readonly string _mainProjectPath;
        private readonly string _mainProjectFolder;
        private readonly string _testProjectFolder;
        private readonly string _testProjectCsproj;
        private readonly string _unitTestsFolder;
        private readonly string _integrationTestsFolder;

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // CONSTRUCTOR
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        public LLMTestGenerator(
            string endpoint,
            string deployment,
            string apiKey,
            string mainProjectPath)
        {
            _llmEndpoint = endpoint?.TrimEnd('/') ?? string.Empty;
            _llmDeployment = deployment ?? string.Empty;
            _llmApiKey = apiKey ?? string.Empty;
            _apiVersion = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("AZURE_API_VERSION")
                          ?? "2024-12-01-preview";

            _httpClient = new HttpClient { Timeout = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(3) };
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_llmApiKey))
            {
                _httpClient.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("api-key", _llmApiKey);
            }

            _mainProjectPath = mainProjectPath;
            _mainProjectFolder = Path.GetDirectoryName(mainProjectPath)!;

            var solutionFolder = Directory.GetParent(_mainProjectFolder)?.FullName
                                  ?? _mainProjectFolder;
            var mainProjectName = Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(mainProjectPath);

            _testProjectFolder = Path.Combine(solutionFolder, $"{mainProjectName}.Tests");
            _testProjectCsproj = Path.Combine(_testProjectFolder, $"{mainProjectName}.Tests.csproj");

            _unitTestsFolder = Path.Combine(_testProjectFolder, "Unit Tests");
            _integrationTestsFolder = Path.Combine(_testProjectFolder, "Integration Tests");
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // FACTORY METHOD
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        public static LLMTestGenerator? TryCreate(
            EventData data,
            string mainProjectPath)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(mainProjectPath) ||
                !File.Exists(mainProjectPath))
            {
                Console.WriteLine(
                    "[TestGen] ⚠ mainProjectPath missing or not found — " +
                    "test generation skipped.");
                return null;
            }

            return new LLMTestGenerator(
                data.llmEndpoint ?? string.Empty,
                data.llmDeployment ?? string.Empty,
                data.llmApiKey ?? string.Empty,
                mainProjectPath);
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // PUBLIC ENTRY POINT
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        public async Task<TestGenerationReport> GenerateAndRunAsync(
            List<FileUsageReport>? affectedFiles = null)
        {
            var report = new TestGenerationReport();

            EnsureTestProjectExists();

            // ✅ Generate tests using LLM based on affected files
            bool testsGenerated = false;
            if (affectedFiles != null && affectedFiles.Count > 0)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] Generating tests for {affectedFiles.Count} affected file(s)...");
                testsGenerated = await GenerateTestsWithLLMAsync(affectedFiles);
            }

            //if (!testsGenerated)
            //{
            //    Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] Creating placeholder tests...");
            //    CreatePlaceholderTests();
            //}

            VerifyTestStructure();

            Console.WriteLine("\n[TestGen] Building test project...");
            var (buildOk, buildOut) = await BuildTestProjectAsync();
            report.BuildSucceeded = buildOk;
            report.BuildOutput = buildOut;

            if (!buildOk)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] ❌ Test project build FAILED.");
                Console.WriteLine(buildOut);
                return report;
            }

            Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] ✅ Test project build succeeded.");

            bool isCs8805SoftPass = buildOut.Contains(
                "CS8805", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (isCs8805SoftPass)
            {
                report.UnitTestResult = new CategoryTestResult
                {
                    Category = "Unit",
                    Passed = true,
                    RawOutput = "Skipped in Phase 2.5 — CS8805 blocks source compilation. Phase 3 is authoritative."
                };
                report.IntegrationTestResult = new CategoryTestResult
                {
                    Category = "Integration",
                    Passed = true,
                    RawOutput = "Skipped in Phase 2.5 — CS8805 blocks source compilation. Phase 3 is authoritative."
                };

                return report;
            }

            Console.WriteLine("\n[TestGen] Running UNIT tests...");
            var unitResult = await RunTestsByCategoryAsync("Unit");
            report.UnitTestResult = unitResult;
            PrintTestCategoryResult("UNIT", unitResult);

            Console.WriteLine("\n[TestGen] Running INTEGRATION tests...");
            var intResult = await RunTestsByCategoryAsync("Integration");
            report.IntegrationTestResult = intResult;
            PrintTestCategoryResult("INTEGRATION", intResult);

            return report;
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // ✅ LLM TEST GENERATION - MAIN ORCHESTRATION
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private async Task<bool> GenerateTestsWithLLMAsync(List<FileUsageReport> affectedFiles)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_llmEndpoint) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_llmApiKey))
            {
                Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] ⚠ LLM credentials not configured - skipping generation");
                return false;
            }

            try
            {
                // Build context from source code
                var context = BuildTestGenerationContext(affectedFiles);

                // Generate Unit Tests
                Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] Calling LLM to generate unit tests...");
                var unitTestCode = await CallLLMForTestGenerationAsync(context, "unit");

                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(unitTestCode))
                {
                    var unitTestPath = Path.Combine(_unitTestsFolder, "GeneratedUnitTests.cs");
                    File.WriteAllText(unitTestPath, unitTestCode);
                    Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ✅ Generated: {Path.GetFileName(unitTestPath)}");
                }

                // Generate Integration Tests (Gherkin + SpecFlow)
                Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] Calling LLM to generate integration tests (Gherkin)...");
                var integrationResult = await CallLLMForTestGenerationAsync(context, "integration");

                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(integrationResult))
                {
                    ParseAndSaveIntegrationTests(integrationResult);
                }

                return true;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ⚠ LLM generation failed: {ex.Message}");
                Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] Stack trace: {ex.StackTrace}");
                return false;
            }
        }
        private bool ValidateGeneratedCode(string code, string testType)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(code))
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ⚠️  Validation failed: Empty {testType} test code");
                return false;
            }

            // Check for required elements
            var requiredElements = testType == "unit"
                ? new[] { "using NUnit.Framework;", "[TestFixture]", "[Test]", "namespace", "public class" }
                : new[] { "using NUnit.Framework;", "using TechTalk.SpecFlow;", "[Binding]", "namespace", "public class" };

            foreach (var element in requiredElements)
            {
                if (!code.Contains(element))
                {
                    Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ⚠️  Validation failed: Missing required element '{element}' in {testType} tests");
                    return false;
                }
            }

            Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ✅ {testType} test code validation passed");
            return true;
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // ✅ CLEAN OLD TEST FILES
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private void CleanOldTestFiles()
        {
            Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] Cleaning old test files...");

            var filesToDelete = new List<string>
            {
                Path.Combine(_unitTestsFolder, "GeneratedUnitTests.cs"),
                Path.Combine(_integrationTestsFolder, "Generated.feature"),
                Path.Combine(_integrationTestsFolder, "GeneratedSteps.cs")
            };

            foreach (var file in filesToDelete)
            {
                if (File.Exists(file))
                {
                    try
                    {
                        File.Delete(file);
                        Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] 🗑️  Deleted: {Path.GetFileName(file)}");
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ⚠️  Could not delete {Path.GetFileName(file)}: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // BUILD TEST GENERATION CONTEXT
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private string BuildTestGenerationContext(List<FileUsageReport> affectedFiles)
        {
            var sb = new StringBuilder();
            sb.AppendLine("# Package Migration Test Generation Context");
            sb.AppendLine();
            sb.AppendLine($"Project: {Path.GetFileName(_mainProjectPath)}");
            sb.AppendLine($"Affected Files: {affectedFiles.Count}");
            sb.AppendLine();

            foreach (var file in affectedFiles)
            {
                sb.AppendLine($"## File: {file.FilePath}");
                sb.AppendLine($"Package Usage Count: {file.MatchedLineNumbers.Count}");
                sb.AppendLine($"Namespaces Used: {string.Join(", ", file.MatchedNamespaces)}");
                sb.AppendLine($"Affected Lines: {string.Join(", ", file.MatchedLineNumbers)}");
                sb.AppendLine();

                // Read actual source code
                var fullPath = Path.Combine(_mainProjectFolder, file.FilePath);
                if (File.Exists(fullPath))
                {
                    sb.AppendLine("### Source Code:");
                    sb.AppendLine("```csharp");

                    // Use OriginalContent if available, otherwise read from disk
                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(file.OriginalContent))
                    {
                        sb.AppendLine(file.OriginalContent);
                    }
                    else if (File.Exists(fullPath))
                    {
                        sb.AppendLine(File.ReadAllText(fullPath));
                    }

                    sb.AppendLine("```");
                }
                sb.AppendLine();
            }

            return sb.ToString();
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // CALL LLM FOR TEST GENERATION
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private async Task<string> CallLLMForTestGenerationAsync(string context, string testType)
        {
            var systemPrompt = testType == "unit"
                ? GetUnitTestSystemPrompt()
                : GetIntegrationTestSystemPrompt();

            var userPrompt = BuildUserPrompt(context, testType);

            var requestBody = new
            {
                messages = new[]
                {
                    new { role = "system", content = systemPrompt },
                    new { role = "user", content = userPrompt }
                },
                max_completion_tokens = 4000,
                temperature = 0.2
            };

            var json = JsonSerializer.Serialize(requestBody);
            var httpContent = new StringContent(json, Encoding.UTF8, "application/json");

            var url = $"{_llmEndpoint}/openai/deployments/{_llmDeployment}/chat/completions?api-version={_apiVersion}";

            Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] Calling: {url}");

            var response = await _httpClient.PostAsync(url, httpContent);

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var error = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                throw new Exception($"LLM API call failed: {response.StatusCode} - {error}");
            }

            var responseJson = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
            var result = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<JsonElement>(responseJson);
            if (result.TryGetProperty("usage",out var usage))
            {
                int promptTokens = usage.GetProperty("prompt_tokens").GetInt32();
                int completionTokens = usage.GetProperty("completion_tokens").GetInt32();
                int totalTokens =usage.GetProperty("total_tokens").GetInt32();
                // Normal logs
                Console.WriteLine($"Prompt Tokens: {promptTokens}");
                Console.WriteLine($"Completion Tokens: {completionTokens}");
                Console.WriteLine($"Total Tokens: {totalTokens}");
                //azure pipeline highlighted logs
                //Console.WriteLine($"##vso[task.logissue type=warning]Prompt Token: {promptTokens}");
                //Console.WriteLine($"##vso[task.logissue type=warning]Completion Token: {completionTokens}");
                //Console.WriteLine($"##vso[task.logissue type=warning]Total Token: {totalTokens}");
                //Console.WriteLine($"##vso[task.setvariable varible=TotalTokens]{totalTokens}");

            }

            var generatedText = result
                .GetProperty("choices")[0]
                .GetProperty("message")
                .GetProperty("content")
                .GetString() ?? string.Empty;

            return ExtractCodeFromMarkdown(generatedText);
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // BUILD USER PROMPT
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private string BuildUserPrompt(string context, string testType)
        {
            var sb = new StringBuilder();
            sb.AppendLine(context);
            sb.AppendLine();
            sb.AppendLine($"**CRITICAL REQUIREMENT: Generate COMPLETE, COMPILABLE, RUNNABLE {testType} tests.**");
            sb.AppendLine();
            sb.AppendLine("The generated tests MUST:");
            sb.AppendLine("1. Compile without ANY syntax errors");
            sb.AppendLine("2. Run successfully in the CI/CD pipeline");
            sb.AppendLine("3. Include ALL required using statements");
            sb.AppendLine("4. Use correct NUnit 4.x syntax");
            sb.AppendLine("5. Have proper namespace declarations");
            sb.AppendLine("6. Include [TestFixture] and [Test] attributes");
            sb.AppendLine("7. Cover the main functionality shown in the source code");
            sb.AppendLine("8. Be production-ready without any manual edits needed");
            sb.AppendLine("✅ GENERATE FULLY FUNCTIONAL TESTS READY TO RUN");
            sb.AppendLine();


            if (testType == "integration")
            {
                sb.AppendLine("- MUST use Gherkin syntax with SpecFlow");
                sb.AppendLine("- Generate BOTH .feature file AND step definitions");
                sb.AppendLine("- Use Given/When/Then structure");
                sb.AppendLine("- Separate the outputs with markers as shown in the system prompt");
                sb.AppendLine("- NO duplicate step definitions for the same assertion");
                sb.AppendLine("- Properly initialize all nullable fields");
                sb.AppendLine("- Separate outputs with the exact markers shown in system prompt");
                sb.AppendLine("⚠️ MANDATORY — STEP SCOPING:");
                sb.AppendLine("- The [Binding] step definition class MUST have [Scope(Feature = \"<feature title>\")] at class level.");
                sb.AppendLine("- The feature title in [Scope] MUST exactly match the Feature: title in the .feature file you generate.");
                sb.AppendLine("- This is NON-NEGOTIABLE. Missing [Scope] causes BindingException: Ambiguous step definitions at runtime.");
                sb.AppendLine("- CORRECT:   [Binding] [Scope(Feature = \"My Feature Title\")] public class MySteps {}");
                sb.AppendLine("- INCORRECT: [Binding] public class MySteps {}   ← will cause ambiguous binding errors");
                sb.AppendLine();

                // ── FIX 2: Force double quotes in Scenario Outline steps ─────────
                sb.AppendLine("⚠️ MANDATORY — SCENARIO OUTLINE QUOTE STYLE:");
                sb.AppendLine("- String placeholders in Then/And steps MUST use double quotes: Then the name is \"<name>\"");
                sb.AppendLine("- Numeric placeholders use NO quotes: And the age is <age>");
                sb.AppendLine("- Step definition regex MUST match the same quote style used in the .feature file.");
                sb.AppendLine("- CORRECT feature step:   Then the deserialized person should have name \"<name>\"");
                sb.AppendLine("- INCORRECT feature step: Then the deserialized person should have name '<name>'");
                sb.AppendLine("- CORRECT regex:   [Then(@\"the deserialized person should have name \\\"(.*)\\\"\")] ");
                sb.AppendLine("- INCORRECT regex: [Then(@\"the deserialized person should have name '(.*)'\")]");
                sb.AppendLine();

                // ── FIX 3: Remind LLM of the exact feature title to scope to ─────
                sb.AppendLine("⚠️ MANDATORY — FEATURE TITLE CONSISTENCY:");
                sb.AppendLine("- Decide the Feature: title FIRST before writing any step definitions.");
                sb.AppendLine("- Use that EXACT title string in [Scope(Feature = \"...\")].");
                sb.AppendLine("- Do NOT change the feature title after writing step definitions.");
            }

            return sb.ToString();
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // ✅ SYSTEM PROMPTS - THE CORE INSTRUCTIONS FOR THE LLM
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private string GetUnitTestSystemPrompt()
        {
            return @"You are a test generation expert specializing in .NET unit testing.

Generate NUnit unit tests for the provided C# code.

**Requirements:**
1. Use NUnit framework (version 4.x)
2. Include [TestFixture] and [Category(""Unit"")] attributes on the test class
3. Use [Test] attribute on test methods
4. Use Assert.That() with constraints (NOT StringAssert or Assert.AreEqual)
5. Follow Arrange-Act-Assert pattern
6. Include proper using statements (NUnit.Framework, System, etc.)
7. Use namespace matching the project structure (e.g., ConsoleApp1.Tests.Unit)
8. Generate complete, compilable code
9. Cover main functionality and edge cases
10. Include descriptive test method names following pattern: MethodName_Scenario_ExpectedResult
11. Tests MUST be runnable immediately without manual edits

Only output the complete C# code, no explanations or markdown around it.";
        }

        private string GetIntegrationTestSystemPrompt()
        {
            return @"You are a BDD test generation expert specializing in Gherkin and SpecFlow.

Generate integration tests using Gherkin syntax with SpecFlow step definitions for .NET.

**CRITICAL: You MUST generate TWO separate outputs:**
1. A .feature file with Gherkin scenarios
2. A .cs file with SpecFlow step definitions

**IMPORTANT: Separate them with these exact markers:**
--- BEGIN FEATURE FILE ---
[feature file content here]
--- END FEATURE FILE ---

--- BEGIN STEP DEFINITIONS ---
[C# step definitions here]
--- END STEP DEFINITIONS ---

**Gherkin Feature File Requirements:**
- Start with Feature: keyword followed by a descriptive name
- Include user story format: As a... I want... So that...
- Use Scenario: for individual test cases
- Follow Given-When-Then structure
- Use Scenario Outline: with Examples: table for data-driven tests
- Write scenarios in plain English

**SpecFlow Step Definitions Requirements:**
- Use C# with NUnit
- Include [Binding] attribute on the class
- Include [Category(""Integration"")] attribute
- Use [Given], [When], [Then] attributes with regex patterns
- NO escape characters in regex patterns
- Use namespace matching project structure
- Implement each Gherkin step as a C# method
- Use private fields to share state between steps";
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // ✅ PARSE AND SAVE INTEGRATION TESTS
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private void ParseAndSaveIntegrationTests(string llmOutput)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] Parsing LLM output for integration tests...");

            // Parse feature file using markers
            var featureStart = llmOutput.IndexOf("--- BEGIN FEATURE FILE ---");
            var featureEnd = llmOutput.IndexOf("--- END FEATURE FILE ---");

            if (featureStart >= 0 && featureEnd > featureStart)
            {
                var featureContent = llmOutput.Substring(
                    featureStart + "--- BEGIN FEATURE FILE ---".Length,
                    featureEnd - featureStart - "--- BEGIN FEATURE FILE ---".Length).Trim();

                var featurePath = Path.Combine(_integrationTestsFolder, "Generated.feature");
                File.WriteAllText(featurePath, featureContent);
                Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ✅ Generated: {Path.GetFileName(featurePath)}");
            }
            else
            {
                Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] ⚠ Feature file markers not found, trying fallback parsing...");
            }

            // Parse step definitions using markers
            var stepsStart = llmOutput.IndexOf("--- BEGIN STEP DEFINITIONS ---");
            var stepsEnd = llmOutput.IndexOf("--- END STEP DEFINITIONS ---");

            if (stepsStart >= 0 && stepsEnd > stepsStart)
            {
                var stepsContent = llmOutput.Substring(
                    stepsStart + "--- BEGIN STEP DEFINITIONS ---".Length,
                    stepsEnd - stepsStart - "--- BEGIN STEP DEFINITIONS ---".Length).Trim();

                var stepsPath = Path.Combine(_integrationTestsFolder, "GeneratedSteps.cs");
                File.WriteAllText(stepsPath, stepsContent);
                Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ✅ Generated: {Path.GetFileName(stepsPath)}");
            }
            else
            {
                Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] ⚠ Step definitions markers not found, trying fallback parsing...");
            }

            // Fallback: if markers not found, try regex parsing
            if (featureStart < 0 || stepsStart < 0)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] Using fallback regex parsing...");

                // Try to find feature file by looking for "Feature:" keyword
                var featureMatch = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Match(
                    llmOutput,
                    @"Feature:.*?(?=using |namespace |$)",
                    System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions.Singleline);

                if (featureMatch.Success)
                {
                    var featurePath = Path.Combine(_integrationTestsFolder, "Generated.feature");
                    File.WriteAllText(featurePath, featureMatch.Value.Trim());
                    Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ✅ Generated (fallback): {Path.GetFileName(featurePath)}");
                }
                else
                {
                    Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] ⚠ Could not extract feature file from LLM output");
                }

                // Try to find C# code by looking for using/namespace
                var stepsMatch = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Match(
                    llmOutput,
                    @"using.*?namespace.*?\{.*?\}",
                    System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions.Singleline);

                if (stepsMatch.Success)
                {
                    var stepsPath = Path.Combine(_integrationTestsFolder, "GeneratedSteps.cs");
                    File.WriteAllText(stepsPath, stepsMatch.Value.Trim());
                    Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ✅ Generated (fallback): {Path.GetFileName(stepsPath)}");
                }
                else
                {
                    Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] ⚠ Could not extract step definitions from LLM output");
                }
            }
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // EXTRACT CODE FROM MARKDOWN
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private string ExtractCodeFromMarkdown(string text)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
                return string.Empty;

            var lines = text.Split('\n');
            var inCodeBlock = false;
            var result = new StringBuilder();

            foreach (var line in lines)
            {
                if (line.TrimStart().StartsWith("```"))
                {
                    inCodeBlock = !inCodeBlock;
                    continue;
                }

                if (inCodeBlock || !text.Contains("```"))
                {
                    result.AppendLine(line);
                }
            }

            return result.ToString().Trim();
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // FALLBACK: PLACEHOLDER TESTS (only if LLM fails)
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

//namespace ConsoleApp1.Tests.Unit
//{
//    [TestFixture]
//    [Category(""Unit"")]
//    public class PlaceholderTests
//    {
//        [Test]
//        public void Migration_ShouldComplete()
//        {
//            Assert.Pass(""Package migration completed. No specific unit tests generated."");
//        }
//    }
//}";
//                File.WriteAllText(unitTestPath, unitTestContent);
//                Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ℹ️  Created placeholder: {Path.GetFileName(unitTestPath)}");
//            }

//            // Feature file placeholder

//            if (!File.Exists(featurePath))

//    As a developer
//    I want to verify the package was migrated
//    So that I can ensure compatibility

//Scenario: Migration completed successfully
//    Given the package was migrated
//    Then the migration should be verified manually";
//                File.WriteAllText(featurePath, featureContent);
//                Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ℹ️  Created placeholder: {Path.GetFileName(featurePath)}");
//            }

//            // Step definitions placeholder
//            var stepsPath = Path.Combine(_integrationTestsFolder, "PlaceholderSteps.cs");
//            if (!File.Exists(stepsPath))
//            {
//                var stepsContent = @"using NUnit.Framework;
//using TechTalk.SpecFlow;

//namespace ConsoleApp1.Tests.Integration
//{
//    [Binding]
//    [Category(""Integration"")]
//    public class PlaceholderSteps
//    {
//        [Given(@""the package was migrated"")]
//        public void GivenThePackageWasMigrated() 
//        { 
//            // Package migration occurred
//        }
        
//        [Then(@""the migration should be verified manually"")]
//        public void ThenTheMigrationShouldBeVerifiedManually()
//        {
//            Assert.Pass(""Manual verification required for this migration."");
//        }
//    }
//}";
//                File.WriteAllText(stepsPath, stepsContent);
//                Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] ℹ️  Created placeholder: {Path.GetFileName(stepsPath)}");
//            }
//        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // VERIFY TEST STRUCTURE
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private void VerifyTestStructure()
        {
            Console.WriteLine("\n[TestGen] Verifying test structure...");

            var unitFiles = Directory.GetFiles(_unitTestsFolder, "*.cs", SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly);
            var featureFiles = Directory.GetFiles(_integrationTestsFolder, "*.feature", SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly);
            var stepFiles = Directory.GetFiles(_integrationTestsFolder, "*Steps.cs", SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly);

            Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] Unit Tests: {unitFiles.Length} file(s)");
            foreach (var file in unitFiles)
                Console.WriteLine($"  • {Path.GetFileName(file)}");

            Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] Integration Tests (Features): {featureFiles.Length} file(s)");
            foreach (var file in featureFiles)
                Console.WriteLine($"  • {Path.GetFileName(file)}");

            Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] Integration Tests (Steps): {stepFiles.Length} file(s)");
            foreach (var file in stepFiles)
                Console.WriteLine($"  • {Path.GetFileName(file)}");

            if (unitFiles.Length == 0)
                Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] ⚠ Warning: No unit test files found!");

            if (featureFiles.Length == 0 || stepFiles.Length == 0)
                Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] ⚠ Warning: Integration tests incomplete!");
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // SCAFFOLD TEST PROJECT
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private void EnsureTestProjectExists()
        {
            Directory.CreateDirectory(_testProjectFolder);
            Directory.CreateDirectory(_unitTestsFolder);
            Directory.CreateDirectory(_integrationTestsFolder);
            Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.Combine(_testProjectFolder, "TestReport"));

            if (File.Exists(_testProjectCsproj))
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] Test project exists: {_testProjectCsproj}");
                return;
            }

            Console.WriteLine($"[TestGen] Creating test project...");

            var relativeRef = Path.GetRelativePath(_testProjectFolder, _mainProjectPath)
                .Replace('\\', '/');

            var targetFramework = GetTargetFramework();

            var csproj = $@"<Project Sdk=""Microsoft.NET.Sdk"">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <GenerateAssemblyInfo>false</GenerateAssemblyInfo>
    <GenerateTargetFrameworkAttribute>false</GenerateTargetFrameworkAttribute>
    <TargetFramework>{targetFramework}</TargetFramework>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include=""Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk"" Version=""17.11.1"" />
    <PackageReference Include=""NUnit"" Version=""4.2.2"" />
    <PackageReference Include=""NUnit3TestAdapter"" Version=""4.6.0"" />
    <PackageReference Include=""SpecFlow"" Version=""3.9.74"" />
    <PackageReference Include=""SpecFlow.NUnit"" Version=""3.9.74"" />
    <PackageReference Include=""SpecFlow.Tools.MsBuild.Generation"" Version=""3.9.74"" />
    <PackageReference Include=""Moq"" Version=""4.20.70"" />
    <PackageReference Include=""FluentAssertions"" Version=""6.12.0"" />
    <PackageReference Include=""Newtonsoft.Json"" Version=""13.0.3"" />
    <PackageReference Include=""Microsoft.Data.SqlClient"" Version=""6.1.4"" />
    <PackageReference Include=""DotNetEnv"" Version=""3.1.1"" />
  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <ProjectReference Include=""{relativeRef}"" />
  </ItemGroup>

</Project>";

            File.WriteAllText(_testProjectCsproj, csproj, Encoding.UTF8);
            Console.WriteLine("[TestGen] ✅ .csproj created with SpecFlow packages.");

            var solutionFolder = Directory.GetParent(_mainProjectFolder)?.FullName ?? _mainProjectFolder;
            var slnFiles = Directory.GetFiles(solutionFolder, "*.sln", SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly);

            foreach (var sln in slnFiles)
            {
                RunDotnetCommand($"sln \"{sln}\" add \"{_testProjectCsproj}\"");
            }
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // BUILD TEST PROJECT
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private async Task<(bool Success, string Output)> BuildTestProjectAsync()
        {
            var (code, stdout, stderr) = await RunDotnetAsync(
                $"build \"{_testProjectCsproj}\" --verbosity normal");

            var combined = stdout + stderr;

            if (code != 0)
            {
                var errorLines = combined
                    .Split(new[] { '\r', '\n' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)
                    .Where(l => System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.IsMatch(
                        l, @"error CS\d+",
                        System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions.IgnoreCase))
                    .ToList();

                bool onlyCs8805 = errorLines.Count > 0
                    && errorLines.All(l => l.Contains("CS8805", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));

                if (onlyCs8805)
                {
                    return (true, combined);
                }
            }

            return (code == 0, combined);
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // RUN TESTS BY CATEGORY
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private async Task<CategoryTestResult> RunTestsByCategoryAsync(string category)
        {
            var (code, stdout, stderr) = await RunDotnetAsync(
                $"test \"{_testProjectCsproj}\" " +
                $"--filter \"TestCategory={category}\" " +
                $"--logger \"console;verbosity=detailed\"");

            var combined = stdout + stderr;

            return new CategoryTestResult
            {
                Category = category,
                Passed = code == 0,
                RawOutput = combined,
                PassCount = CountOccurrences(combined, " passed"),
                FailCount = CountOccurrences(combined, " failed"),
                SkipCount = CountOccurrences(combined, " skipped")
            };
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // PRINT TEST CATEGORY RESULT
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private static void PrintTestCategoryResult(string label, CategoryTestResult r)
        {
            var icon = r.Passed ? "✅" : "❌";
            var status = r.Passed ? "PASSED" : "FAILED";

            Console.WriteLine("\n╔══════════════════════════════════════╗");
            Console.WriteLine($"║  {icon} {label,-11} — {status,-14}║");
            Console.WriteLine("╠══════════════════════════════════════╣");
            Console.WriteLine($"║  Passed  : {r.PassCount,-27}║");
            Console.WriteLine($"║  Failed  : {r.FailCount,-27}║");
            Console.WriteLine($"║  Skipped : {r.SkipCount,-27}║");
            Console.WriteLine("╚══════════════════════════════════════╝");

            if (!r.Passed)
            {
                var failLines = r.RawOutput
                    .Split('\n')
                    .Where(l =>
                        l.Contains("FAIL", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                        l.Contains("Error", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                    .Take(20);

                Console.WriteLine("  Failure details:");
                foreach (var line in failLines)
                    Console.WriteLine($"    {line.Trim()}");
            }
        }

        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
        // HELPER METHODS
        // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

        private string GetTargetFramework()
        {
            try
            {
                var xml = System.Xml.Linq.XDocument.Load(_mainProjectPath);
                var tf = xml.Descendants("TargetFramework").FirstOrDefault()?.Value;
                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(tf)) return tf;
            }
            catch { }
            return "net8.0";
        }

        private static int CountOccurrences(string text, string keyword)
        {
            int count = 0, idx = 0;
            while ((idx = text.IndexOf(keyword, idx, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) >= 0)
            {
                count++;
                idx += keyword.Length;
            }
            return count;
        }

        private static void RunDotnetCommand(string arguments)
        {
            using var p = new Process
            {
                StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = "dotnet",
                    Arguments = arguments,
                    RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                    RedirectStandardError = true,
                    UseShellExecute = false,
                    CreateNoWindow = true
                }
            };
            p.Start();
            p.WaitForExit();
        }

        private static async Task<(int ExitCode, string StdOut, string StdErr)>
            RunDotnetAsync(string arguments)
        {
            using var process = new Process();
            process.StartInfo = new ProcessStartInfo
            {
                FileName = "dotnet",
                Arguments = arguments,
                RedirectStandardOutput = true,
                RedirectStandardError = true,
                UseShellExecute = false,
                CreateNoWindow = true
            };

            var stdout = new StringBuilder();
            var stderr = new StringBuilder();

            process.OutputDataReceived += (_, e) =>
            {
                if (e.Data != null) stdout.AppendLine(e.Data);
            };
            process.ErrorDataReceived += (_, e) =>
            {
                if (e.Data != null) stderr.AppendLine(e.Data);
            };

            process.Start();
            process.BeginOutputReadLine();
            process.BeginErrorReadLine();
            await process.WaitForExitAsync();

            return (process.ExitCode, stdout.ToString(), stderr.ToString());
        }
    }
}
